# ADR-0001: First decision

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-05

## Context

A well-formed decision, sole occupant of a directory whose README.md is a policy
page rather than an index. Not being named in that README is not drift.

## Decision

Use this as the negative control for D7's empty-index guard.

## Consequences

None — zero findings are expected across every check.
